message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-gossip-config): pin GossipConfig defaults + PriorityGossipPolicy + IbltDecodeError contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-7m5qe)

25 tests pinning gossip cadence + revocation-push policy + IBLT
decode error taxonomy. Complements mesh_gossip_summary_conformance
which covered the summary shape.

- 6 documented public constants pinned individually:
  DEFAULT_MAX_OBJECTS_PER_SUMMARY=10_000,
  DEFAULT_MAX_SYMBOLS_PER_SUMMARY=100_000,
  DEFAULT_SUMMARY_TTL_SECS=300, DEFAULT_MAX_FUTURE_SKEW_SECS=30,
  DEFAULT_RECONCILIATION_BATCH_SIZE=1000,
  MAX_OBJECT_IDS_PER_REQUEST=100
- GossipConfig::default uses every documented constant; plus the
  3 explicit defaults: priority_gossip_interval_ms=100,
  max_revocation_push_peers=32, max_peer_states=4096
- max_iblt_bytes() const-fn yields positive byte budget at default
- PriorityGossipPolicy::default = DirectPush (revocations push to
  all online peers immediately — drift slows propagation); 3 distinct
  variants; Copy + serde roundtrip
- IbltDecodeError 3 variants with documented payloads:
  TooLarge{len,max}, InvalidEncoding (unit), TooManyChanges{decoded,
  max}; PartialEq compares payloads
- GossipStats 3-field Clone preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
